nasb.text: But if your eye is bad, your whole body will be full of darkness. If then the light that is in you is darkness, how great is the darkness!

esv.text: but if your eye is bad, your whole body will be full of darkness. If then the light in you is darkness, how great is the darkness!

cnv.text: 如果你的眼睛有毛病，全身就都黑暗。如果你裡面的光變成黑暗，這是多麼的黑暗！

ccb.text: 要是你的眼睛昏花，全身就黑暗。如果你里面的光黑暗了，那黑暗是多么大啊！

csbs.text: 如果你的眼睛污浊，你的全身就黑暗。因此，光如果在你里面成了黑暗，那是多么大的黑暗！
